chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P. No.S-189 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.08.2025 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Lartik, advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Asstt. A. G. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. Inspector Imran Ali Bhatti, SHO PS Waleed, Inspector Hussain Bux Brohi, SHO PS Baqapur & SIP Abid Hussain Chandio Ex-SHO PS Areeja Phero are present. -.-.-.-.-.- Statements filed on behalf of official respondents No.1 to 4, taken on record, copies of same have been provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Official respondents have stated in their statements/comments that they had never harassed the petitioner and her family members nor they intend to do so in future. However, the petitioner’s sons, namely, Shahnawaz, Sadaruddin, Wazeer @ Irfan Ali, Papan, Nazeer, Zulfiqar & Kashif @ Lal Bux are involved in criminal activities and many cases have been registered against them, in which they are declared as proclaimed offenders. Learned Asstt. A. G Sindh and learned Addl. P. G submitted that official respondents are legally bound to provide legal protection to all the citizens including the petitioner without any discrimination. However, since the sons of the petitioner are involved in many criminal cases, therefore the official respondents will proceed against them in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the statements made by learned Asstt. A. G and learned Addl. P. G sought disposal of instant petition. Order accordingly. Let copy of this order be provided to learned Asstt. A. G, learned Addl. P. G and copy of the same shall also be communicated to SSP Larkana & SSP Kamber over fax for compliance.
P. G and copy of the same shall also be communicated to SSP Larkana & SSP Kamber over fax for compliance. Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
